meta.title: Applicant Sign Up
meta.description: Join the Leland community and we'll send you free resources and match you with the perfect coach.

thankyou_screens.title:
We're browsing thousands of coaches to find the *best options for your budget and goals.* You'll be redirected shortly...

Next up: reach out to 2-3 potential coaches! 

Don't be shy, they are excited to talk with you. 🚀
All done! Thanks for your time.

properties.description: Our reps are typically available between 8AM - 5PM PT Monday-Friday. If you request a call outside of those hours, one of our reps will call you at their next availability.
